passive.name: Love Tap
passive.description: Miss Fortune deals bonus physical damage whenever she basic attacks a new target.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Miss Fortune}} basic attacks apply a mark that expires when attacking a new enemy. If the enemy was unmarked, this also deals {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Miss Fortune's''' [[basic attack]]s are empowered to apply a mark that expires upon attacking a new enemy. If the enemy was unmarked, this also deals {{as|{{pp|key=%|50 to 100 for 6|1;4;7 to 13|formula=50% + 10% every 3 levels up to 7, then + 10% every 2 levels up to 13}} AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, halved to {{as|{{pp|key=%|50/2 to 100/2 for 6|1;4;7 to 13|formula=25% + 5% every 3 levels up to 7, then + 5% every 2 levels up to 13}} AD}} against {{tip|minion|minions}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* With {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}}, ''Love Tap'' only applies to the primary target.
* The bonus damage applies {{sti|life steal|link=true}}.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[buildings]].

Q.name: Double Up
Q.description: Miss Fortune fires a bullet at an enemy, damaging them and a target behind them. Both strikes can also apply Love Tap.
Q.tooltip:
Miss Fortune fires a bouncing shot, dealing {{ totaldamagetooltip }} physical damage to an enemy and to another one behind them. 

The second shot can critically strike for {{ totaldamagecrit }} physical damage. It always critically strikes if the first shot kills its target.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Miss Fortune}} fires a shot at the target enemy that deals {{as|physical damage}}, which then bounces to hit another enemy behind them. This applies {{tip|on-hit}} effects to both enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Double Up's'' bounce can {{tip|critically strike}}, and does so if ''Double Up'' kills the primary target.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Miss Fortune''' fires a shot at the target enemy that deals {{as|physical damage}}, which then bounces to hit another enemy behind them. This applies {{tip|on-attack}} effects to the first enemy hit, and {{tip|on-hit}} effects to both enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Double Up's'' bounce is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers. If ''Double Up'' kills the primary target, the bounce will {{tip|critically strike}}.
wiki_detail.description3: ''The bounce prioritizes units directly behind the primary target. A target does not have to be {{tip|sight|visible}} be hit by the bounce.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Double Up'' deals {{tip|basic damage}} to both targets, but also triggers spell effects by dealing an additional 0 {{tip|spell damage}}.
* {{tip|Spell shield|Spell shields}} can be used by either target. If it is on the primary target, the spell shield will not prevent the shot from bouncing. 
* Neutral units count as valid targets to bounce.
* The bounce follows a priority order on targets behind in a certain angle:
*# 500 units in 20º.
*# 500 units in 40º.
*# 500 units in 110º.
*# {{tt|150 units|Estimated}} in 160º.
* ''Double Up's'' cast range adjusts based on '''Miss Fortune's''' {{sti|attack range}}, which can be increased by items such as {{ii|Rapid Firecannon}}.
* The damage of a {{tip|critical strike|critically striking}} shot is {{ap|20*1.75 to 100*1.75}} {{as|(+ 175% AD)}} {{as|(+ 61.25% AP)}} {{as|physical damage}}, increased to {{ap|20*2.1 to 100*2.1}} {{as|(+ 210% AD)}} {{as|(+ 73.5% AP)}} {{as|physical damage}} by {{iis|Infinity Edge}} bonus critical damage.
* If there is no secondary target, the shot will not bounce and the dud will instead fall to the ground.
** The dud lands on the ground 176 units behind the primary target and has a missile speed of 400 on its way there.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

W.name: Strut
W.description: Miss Fortune passively gains Move Speed when not attacked. This ability can be activated to grant bonus Attack Speed for a short duration. While it's on cooldown, Love Taps reduce the remaining cooldown of Strut.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Miss Fortune}} gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} after a few seconds without being attacked. This bonus is increased after another few seconds, and is granted instantly whenever ''Strut'' is cast.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Marking a new target with ''{{ai|Love Tap|Miss Fortune}}'' reduces ''Strut's'' cooldown.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Miss Fortune''' gains {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Miss Fortune''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} after 4 seconds without taking non-{{tip|persistent damage|persistent}} damage. This bonus is increased after another 3 seconds, and is granted instantly whenever ''Strut'' is cast or upon [[death|respawning]].
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|30 to 50}}}}
{{st|Increased Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|60 to 100}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Miss Fortune''' gains {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for 4 seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: Marking a new target with ''{{ai|Love Tap|Miss Fortune}}'' reduces ''Strut's'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} by {{tt|2 seconds|Affected by ability haste}}.

E.name: Make It Rain
E.description: Miss Fortune reveals an area with a flurry of bullets, dealing waves of damage to opponents and slowing them.
E.tooltip: Miss Fortune rains bullets, revealing an area, Slowing by {{ totalslowamount }} and dealing {{ totaldamagepersecond }} magic damage per second for {{ baseduration }} seconds (total {{ totaldamage }} magic damage).{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Miss Fortune''' casts a storm of bullets at the target location for a short time, which continually deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slows}} enemies within.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Miss Fortune''' casts a storm of bullets at the target location for 2 seconds, granting {{tip|sight}} of the area, dealing {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.25}} seconds to enemies within, and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 40% {{as|(+ 6% per 100 AP)}}.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Magic Damage Per Tick|{{ap|70/8 to 190/8}} {{as|(+ {{ap|120/8}}% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|70 to 190}} {{as|(+ 120% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: ''Make It Rain will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''

R.name: Bullet Time
R.description: Miss Fortune channels a barrage of bullets into a cone in front of her, dealing large amounts of damage to enemies. Each wave of Bullet Time can critically strike
R.tooltip:
Miss Fortune channels a barrage of bullets, firing {{ basewaves }} waves over {{ basechannelduration }} seconds, dealing {{ physicaldamageperwave }} physical damage per wave (total {{ totalphysicaldamage }} physical damage).

Each wave can critically strike for %i:scaleCrit% {{ critdamageperwave }} physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Miss Fortune''' {{tip|channel|channels}} for a short time, firing several waves of bullets in the target direction that deal {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit. Each wave can {{tip|critically strike}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Miss Fortune''' {{tip|channel|channels}} for up to 3 seconds, firing a number of waves of bullets in the target direction. Each wave is in a spread of 6 projectiles that deals {{as|75% AD}} {{as|(+ 25% AP)}} {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Total Waves|{{ap|14 to 18}}|Maximum Total Physical Damage|{{as|{{ap|75*14 to 75*18}}% AD}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25*14 to 25*18}}% AP)}}}} {{st|Wave Interval Time| {{ap|2.85/(14 to 18)|round=4}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: Each of the waves can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} for {{as|{{critical damage|20}} '''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.angle: {{tt|30{{degree}}|The effective angle is wider based the width of the missile streams + enemy size}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The damage dealt by each wave of ''Bullet Time'' is calculated when the wave reaches the target.
* '''Miss Fortune''' {{tip|sight|reveals}} herself for {{fd|4.5}} seconds if there is an enemy champion within the area.
* Targets cannot be damaged by more than one projectile per wave.
* The bullet streams that each fire 1 projectile per wave are spead by 6{{degree}} between one another, aiming towards the angles +-3/9/15{{degree}} from '''Miss Fortune's''' facing direction.
* ''Bullet time'' picks 6 locations on the ground 500 units from '''Miss Fortune''' (with the aforementioned angles) and fires a bullet stream towards each.
** If '''Miss Fortune''' is moved to a new location, these locations '''will''' update (since patch [[V13.3]]); the cone will fire towards her new facing direction.
* ''Bullet time'' fires the first wave at {{rutngt|0.05}}, and the last at {{rutngt|2.9}}. Times between waves are equally spread between these values.
** '''Miss Fortune''' may cancel the last ~{{fd|0.1}} seconds of channel time at no loss of effect.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Miss Fortune''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|channel|attack=interrupts|cast=interrupts|move=interrupts|items=interrupts,true,,false|consume=true|spells=true,interrupts,interrupts,interrupts,interrupts}}
